2603.27119.title: Bayesian-Symbolic Integration for Uncertainty-Aware Parking Prediction
2603.27119.paper_summary: Accurate parking availability prediction is critical for intelligent transportation systems, but real-world deployments often face data sparsity, noise, and unpredictable changes. Addressing these challenges requires models that are not only accurate but also uncertainty-aware. In this work, we propose a loosely coupled neuro-symbolic framework that integrates Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) with symbolic reasoning to enhance robustness in uncertain environments. BNNs quantify predictive uncertainty, while symbolic knowledge extracted via decision trees and encoded using probabilistic logic programming is leveraged in two hybrid strategies: (1) using symbolic reasoning as a fallback when BNN confidence is low, and (2) refining output classes based on symbolic constraints before reapplying the BNN. We evaluate both strategies on real-world parking data under full, sparse, and noisy conditions. Results demonstrate that both hybrid methods outperform symbolic reasoning alone, and the context-refinement strategy consistently exceeds the performance of Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks and BNN baselines across all prediction windows. Our findings highlight the potential of modular neuro-symbolic integration in real-world, uncertainty-prone prediction tasks.
2603.27119.paper_summary_zh: 準確的停車可用性預測對於智慧交通系統至關重要，但現實世界中的部署往往面臨數據稀疏、噪音和不可預測的變化。解決這些挑戰需要模型不僅準確，還要能夠考慮不確定性。在本研究中，我們提出了一個鬆散耦合的神經符號框架，將貝葉斯神經網絡（BNNs）與符號推理相結合，以增強在不確定環境中的穩健性。BNNs量化預測不確定性，而通過決策樹提取的符號知識，並使用概率邏輯編程進行編碼，則在兩種混合策略中被利用：（1）在BNN信心低時使用符號推理作為備用，和（2）在重新應用BNN之前根據符號約束細化輸出類別。我們在全量、稀疏和噪音條件下的現實世界停車數據上評估了這兩種策略。結果顯示，這兩種混合方法均優於單獨的符號推理，而上下文細化策略在所有預測窗口中始終超過長短期記憶（LSTM）網絡和BNN基準的性能。我們的發現突顯了模塊化神經符號整合在現實世界易受不確定性影響的預測任務中的潛力。
2603.27119.author: Alireza Nezhadettehad et.al.
2603.27119.authors: Alireza Nezhadettehad, Arkady Zaslavsky, Abdur Rakib, Seng W. Loke
